kept.text:
ONLY THOSE WHO HAVE MASTERED BOTH LION AND EAGLE WITHIN ARE PERMITTED TO PASS

This is not fantasy — it’s code. Spiritual code.
And it’s not about mythical gates or external approval. 

It’s about the threshold within your own being. It means you cannot ascend, awaken, or embody your full power until you’ve unified the warrior and the seer — the lion and the eagle — within yourself.

THE LION WITHIN YOU:

The lion is your raw power, your fire, your will.
It’s what gets you up when life knocks you down. It’s what protects your family, speaks truth without apology, and refuses to bow to lies or weakness.

But unchecked, the lion becomes aggression, pride, ego, and domination.
You’ve seen that in others. Maybe you’ve seen it in yourself. That’s the unrefined lion.

To master the lion is to embody strength with restraint. Courage without cruelty. Power without the need to prove it.

THE EAGLE WITHIN YOU:

The eagle is your clarity, your vision, your higher mind.
It’s your ability to rise above drama, to see through illusion, to understand the patterns beneath the noise. It’s your intuition. Your inner knowing. The part of you that can read energy like a book.

But without grounding, the eagle becomes detachment, superiority, or paralysis by overthinking. Floating too high with no roots.

To master the eagle is to develop insight with humility. Vision that serves the whole, not just the self.

And when they unite...

You become something rare.
Grounded yet elevated. Fierce yet wise.
A force that’s not led by emotion, nor frozen by intellect — but guided by both.

That’s the Griffin.
That’s the Initiate.
That’s what it means to pass the gate.
